prediction.reasoning: For a 6-day prediction of SPGI stock, I applied a random walk model with historical volatility estimation. Based on typical large-cap financial services stock behavior, I estimated an annualized volatility of approximately 25%. This translates to a 6-day standard deviation of roughly 3.65%. The point estimate remains at the current price due to the random walk assumption. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with increasing widths for higher confidence levels.
